data.content:
Plan review approval, 2026-04-25

Reviewed the harness plan. It is complete, feasible, and grounded in the expanded b7c0 proof. Key approval points: the harness explicitly closes child stdin; it exercises the representative safe Playwright tool matrix including browser_evaluate; it uses Codex default_tools_approval_mode="approve" and OpenCode "playwright_*":"allow"; and it keeps live model calls out of default tests unless explicitly gated. Approved for implementation.
